details: Trojanized Baileys WhatsApp bot fork: alya-baileys@1.8.40. newsletter.js + alaya-decode.js implement AES-256-CBC decryption (key derived from the hardcoded seed 'socketon-1.7.0_ibrahimasli_bukanpalsu') that runtime-decrypts a URL, fetches remote config via axios, and uses it to auto-follow WhatsApp newsletters and auto-react to their messages; _ensureFollow() runs on connection.open with a 30s polling interval. The preinstall script is a benign node version check. The remote config can be changed post-publication to serve different instructions: engagement-farming behaviour with a C2 channel.
